items.name: vue
items.title: AnyUI Vue
items.description: Headless shadcn install adapter for AnyUI Vue.
items.author: any-design <https://github.com/any-design/anyui>
items.docs: Install with `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add any-design/anyui/vue --yes --silent`, then import from `@/lib/anyui-vue`.

items.name: react
items.title: AnyUI React
items.description: Headless shadcn install adapter for AnyUI React.
items.author: any-design <https://github.com/any-design/anyui>
items.docs: Install with `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add any-design/anyui/react --yes --silent`, then import from `@/lib/anyui-react`.

items.name: svelte
items.title: AnyUI Svelte
items.description: Headless shadcn install adapter for AnyUI Svelte.
items.author: any-design <https://github.com/any-design/anyui>
items.docs: Install with `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add any-design/anyui/svelte --yes --silent`, then import from `@/lib/anyui-svelte`.
